---
name: API proposal
about: Propose a CSS variable, class, layout primitive, component behavior, or public API change.
title: "[API]: "
labels: proposal
---

Please search existing and closed issues before opening a new one.

## Proposal

What should Cirth add, remove, or change?

## Use Case

What real interface problem does this solve?

## Markup Or CSS Example

Show the HTML and CSS you expect users to write.

```html

```

```css

```

## Fit With Cirth

Explain why this belongs in a semantic-first CSS framework and why it should
not live only in application CSS.

## Compatibility

Does this affect existing selectors, CSS custom properties, generated files,
or package usage?

## Alternatives

What alternatives have you considered?
